STATUS: 429
HEADER: Retry-After: Wed, 30 Apr 2026 12:00:00 GMT
HEADER: Content-Type: text/html
EXPECT: rate_limit
NOTE: 429 with HTTP-date Retry-After (RFC 7231 alternate form). Detector must not parse the value — only existence + status matters.
---
<html><body><h1>Too Many Requests</h1></body></html>
